title: YTP: THIS IS THE INTER-INTER-INTER-INTERNET!
description:
Thus ends the epic tennis match between me and Wheeliedude (bubzy107).

Round 6 sees Michael Buckley destroy Goliath while M. Bison tries to destroy the internet, with Adam and Eve beating him to it again... wait, when was the first time? Did we miss it?

Good game to be had by all :D

Clips/Audio added:

Superbook
My LIttle Pony
Muse - Knights of Cydonia
Street Fighter
A fan...
All of the previous rounds :P
